case_title: GUILLERMO VALDEZ VS. JOSE A ESCOLERO BONILLO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOLERO BONILLO, JOSE A , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA LA OFICINA BAR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
